title: Scanner Finding
description: Single scanner finding object emitted by .scripts/context-file-scan/scan.sh. Locked per scanner-design-spec.md § 2.2 + § 2.3. Documentation-only contract per locked Decision 2 — no runtime validator; fixture tests verify conformance.

rule_id.description: Rule identifier — S1-S9 (structural) or B1-B8 (behavioral) per spec §§ 3-4.

rule_class.description: Whether the rule belongs to the structural (S) or behavioral (B) family.

severity.description: Severity band per spec § 1.4 / § 3 / § 4. Release-gate (--release-gate) blocks on warn or surface-loudly unless covered by exception.

title.description: Locked finding title from policy C6 (e.g., 'Size breach', 'Layer violation'). The voice lint allowlists this field for otherwise-banned words like 'violation' that appear in canonical template labels.

source_file.description: Relative path (from project root) to the file the finding was detected in. Critical for multi-file scans (Decision 6) — a primary CLAUDE.md and discovered companion (e.g., .claude/rules/source-editing.md) may each own findings.

section_anchor.description: Section heading the finding appears under, lowercased and whitespace-collapsed. Use the literal string '<root>' when the finding is file-wide (e.g., S1 size, B1 missing baseline).

fingerprint.description: Deterministic 16-hex-char fingerprint = sha256(rule_id|source_file|section_anchor|normalized_subject)[:16] per spec § 1.4. Used as exception coverage match key.

template_substitutions.description: Per-rule substitution values for the locked output template. Keys vary by rule; the agent fills these into the policy C6 template at render time. additionalProperties allowed because rule-specific substitution sets evolve.

normalized_subject.description: The specific thing flagged, normalized per spec § 1.4 'Normalized subject per rule' canonical mapping table. Feeds the fingerprint computation. Examples: 'size-18432' (S1), '<broken-path>' (S3), '<rule-name>' (B5).

suggested_action.description: Structured description of the recommended action.

type.description: Action category. Common values: move_to_layer, remove, remove_or_scope, add_section, add_pointer, add_example, consolidate, document_deviation, extend_or_graduate, convert_to_pointer, draft_positive_direction.

layer_target.description: Destination layer name when type=move_to_layer (per C5 fallback matrix). Null when no target applies (e.g., type=remove).

layer_target_available.description: Whether the primary destination layer was detected by the layer probe. False triggers fallback per C5.

fallback_used.description: True when the layer probe routed to a fallback rather than the primary destination.

preview_command.description: Optional copy-paste-ready command, diff, or snippet for show-don't-tell rendering (per C4).

exception_label.description: Locked exception-option text from policy C6 (e.g., '[Acknowledge — file is intentionally this size]'). Rendered verbatim by the agent in the AskUserQuestion options.
